headline: Ministry KPIs changed mid-year in 7 cases to show better performance
context: Seven federal ministries changed their Key Performance Indicators mid-year in 2025, invariably lowering targets to convert projected failures into reported successes.

cards.big: 7 ministries quietly changed their KPIs mid-year — all to make failure look like success
cards.sub: When you can't hit the target, just move the target closer

cards.big: No Treasury guideline prohibits mid-year KPI modification by ministries
cards.sub: Performance framework has no integrity safeguard against target manipulation

cards.big: Modified KPIs affected reporting on RM28 billion in programme spending
cards.sub: Performance claims on major programmes became meaningless after target changes

cards.big: PEMANDU-era KPI system was abandoned but no replacement framework was implemented
cards.sub: Government operates without a credible national performance tracking system

cards.big: KPIs that can be changed to guarantee success measure nothing except the willingness to deceive
Should ministry KPIs be locked by Treasury and verified by the Auditor General?
